$comment: FireSafe PIR sandwich panel indicative price bands — Pakistan, Q2 2026. Panel-only, ex-works Lahore plant. Excludes structural support, freight, installation. Bands derived from market research (OLX Pakistan reverse-conversion, Silver Steel + Golden Steel published PU price tables, PPGI steel-coil cost build, IndiaMART India floor reference). Izhar premium positioning at market median +15-18%, justified by FireSafe PIR (B1 fire class, lambda 0.022 W/m·K aged, eco-pentane).

panels.label: Ambient warehouse / prefab — most common 4×8 ft wall panel
panels.useCase: Ambient warehouse, prefab buildings, light-duty rooms

facing_multipliers.$comment: Multiplier on base PKR/m² for facing gauge. Base assumes 0.5 mm pre-painted galvanised both faces.

light.label: Light: 0.4 mm pre-painted GI both faces

standard.label: Standard: 0.5 mm pre-painted GI both faces (default)

heavy.label: Heavy: 0.6 mm pre-painted GI both faces

length_uplifts.$comment: Uplift on PKR/m² for non-standard panel lengths (longer = fewer site joints, but more wastage above 40 ft).

volume_discounts.$comment: Discount tiers based on total order volume (m²). Indicative — actual discount confirmed at quote.

freight_pkr_per_m2.$comment: Indicative freight from Lahore plant per m² of panel. Linear approximation. Real freight depends on truck count, route, and palletisation.
